allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -U postgres -h localhost -d postpilot -c "SELECT id, linkedin_url, label, created_at FROM sources ORDER BY id;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -U postgres -h localhost -d postpilot -c "\\d processed_posts")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -U postgres -h localhost -d postpilot -c "\\dt post_image*")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -U postgres -h localhost -d postpilot -c "ALTER TABLE processed_posts ADD COLUMN reimagine_status VARCHAR NOT NULL DEFAULT ''idle'';")
